title: Subitem Due Date Reminders
excerpt: Hello, I use Monday to track invoices for a project.  I list the project as an item and then all invoices for that project get entered as a subitem.  The subitem includes the invoice number, status and due date.  I would…

posts.author: DebStat21 (Deborah)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, I use Monday to track invoices for a project. I list the project as an item and then all invoices for that project get entered as a subitem. The subitem includes the invoice number, status and due date. I would like to create an automated reminder when the status is overdue after the due date so I can start reaching out to clients about payment. Right now the due date column in subitems does not support this. Is there a work around or any plans for this in the future? Thanks!

image2184×686 136 KB

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @DebStat21

Welcome back to the community. Creating a custom automation like this would do the job (I think)
